Designed to be stacked on top of a five gallon bucket, use these plastic sifting screens or soil sifters to separate high value pay dirt from other unwanted organic material, like rocks, gravels, plant matter and aggregates. ASR Outdoor heavy duty plastic sifting screen is made from tough and durable polypropylene plastic that will see you through many gold prospecting or rock hounding seasons to come. INSTRUCTIONS: To test silver quaity, scratch the item onto the test stone leaving a visible deposit. Place a small drop solution over the top the deposit; the quality of the silver is approximated according to the color the solution turns when it is applied to the sample. If the solution turns cream-colored, that indicates high quality silver. If the solution turns black, that indicates coin quality. If the solution turns green, that indicates high amounts of copper/poor quality. If the solution turns gold-colored, that indicates a brass or silver plated item. When done, add an equal amount of neutralizing solution to neutralize the silver solution. Ensure the testing stone has been thoroughly washed and neutralized before performing any testing.
